scripts.dev:service: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:OPENAI_API_KEY = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('OPENAI_API_KEY','User'); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($env:OPENAI_API_KEY)) { throw 'OPENAI_API_KEY is not configured in user environment.' }; go run ./services/local-service/cmd/server"
